title: Experiment and [WIP] record attempt: Weight decay reduces quantization gap and artifact size
author: leloykun

data.description: Scaled model depth up from 9 to 12 layers to use the reduced artifact size budget for a larger model.
Reduced training batch size to fit within the 10-minute wallclock limit on the main leaderboard track.

novel_contributions: Experimental evidence that weight decay significantly reduces the pre- vs. post-quantization validation loss/bpb gap.
Experimental evidence that weight decay significantly reduces quantized artifact file size.
A record attempt using aggressive weight decay and a deeper model enabled by the smaller artifact size.
Paired one-sided t-tests on 6 seeds supporting the quantization-gap reduction claim.
